---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Lia
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature and how?

**Example scenarios:**
1. As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]
2. When [situation], I need [capability] to achieve [goal]

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples of similar features in other applications.

## 📈 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Can't use Lia effectively without it
- [ ] High - Significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Would be cool someday

## 🛠️ Technical Considerations

If you have technical insights or implementation ideas, share them here:

- Required dependencies or integrations
- Potential challenges
- Performance considerations
- Security implications

## 🔗 Related Features/Issues

Link any related issues or features:
- #issue_number

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or information about the feature request here.
